question: What can travel around the world while staying in the same place?
I am not alive, but I grow; I don't have lungs, but I need air; I don't have a mouth, but water kills me. What am I?
What has a neck but no head?
What has legs, but doesn't walk?
What has a bed but never sleeps?
I am taken from a mine and shut up in a wooden case, from which I am never released, and yet I am used by everyone. What am I?
What has legs but doesn't walk?
What has hundreds of ears but can't hear a thing?
What has many faces but no body?
What kind of tree can you carry in your hand?
What can fill a room but takes up no space?
What goes up and down but doesn’t move?
What word is always spelled wrong in the dictionary?
What comes down but never goes up?
I speak without a mouth and hear without ears. I have nobody, but I come alive with wind. What am I?
